text: Hey I'm Jeff Brown you're watching another Hi5Camp trick tips. We're going to be talking about how to do one of my favorite tricks, the tame dog.
The tame dog is a super fun trick. You can do it pretty much anywhere on the mountain. You can do it off moguls, off cat tracks. It's awesome. I love it.
So you're going to want to be riding in flat face with your leading hand way up in the sky.
As you get near whatever you plan on doing the tame dog off of, throw your arm down as you nollie as hard as you can.
Alright this is the part where everybody screws it up. You want to pop off your nose as hard as you can and your momentum actually goes upwards in a sort of handless cartwheel.
At this point you want to suck up your legs and throw yourself into a ball. It's pretty hard to spot the landing so you're kind of just guessing.
I know it's a lot to think of. So just think of these two things. Pop really hard on the ground.
And as you're flipping, tuck up into a ball.
Thanks for watching this Hi5 Camp trick tip. I hope you enjoy the tame dog as much as I do. And good luck.
